title: Open-Source Translator Modules
description: One module per language pointing to verified open-source translation resources from reputable venues, with a SeamlessM4T v2 speech-to-text fallback where the language is supported.

verify_before_commercial: garifuna-nllb (card says MIT but base is NLLB CC-BY-NC)
licensing_guidance.note: For paid client work prefer Apache-2.0 / CC-BY resources. CC-BY-NC resources are excellent for learning, evaluation, and building your own data assets.

speech_to_text_summary.note: For languages Seamless does not cover, transcribe voice notes by hand or use a verified community ASR.

offline_guidance: OPUS-MT = lightest for on-device text MT. NLLB / MADLAD-400 should be quantized (CTranslate2 int8 or GGUF 2–4-bit). SeamlessM4T v2 is large — prefer server-side or aggressive quantization.

verification.method: Each model/dataset link, provider, venue, and licence was checked against live Hugging Face / GitHub / ACL Anthology pages on the verified_on date.
checked: jhu-clsp/kreyol-mt (+ -pubtrain, -scratch) + github JHU-CLSP/Kreyol-MT — OK (NAACL 2024); covers cab (Garifuna)
arnoldramo/garifuna-nllb — OK; CORRECTION: card declares MIT (base NLLB is CC-BY-NC); cab_Latn; experimental
facebook/seamless-m4t-v2-large — OK (CC-BY-NC-4.0); covers fr/pt/es/wo, NOT ht/bm/fon/cab
corrections_from_previous_version: Garifuna model licence changed from 'inherits NLLB CC-BY-NC' to declared MIT (with base-model caveat).
Added Kreyòl-MT to the Garifuna module (it supports cab).
Added SeamlessM4T v2 speech-to-text where supported; added OkwuGbé ASR for Fon.

primary_venues_referenced: Dossou & Emezue — FFR (WiNLP 2020) and OkwuGbé Fon/Igbo ASR (2021)
